name: Caramel Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Remove all unpopped kernels from popped corn.
3. Place popcorn in a greased 17 x 12 x 2-inch baking pan.
4. Keep popcorn warm in the oven while making caramel mixture.
5. In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, combine brown sugar, margarine or butter, and corn syrup.
6. Cook and stir over medium heat until boiling.
7. Clip a candy thermometer to the side of the pan.
8. Cook and stir on medium heat until it reaches 255°F (hard-ball stage), about 4 minutes.
9. Remove saucepan from heat. Stir in baking soda and vanilla extract; pour over popcorn.
10. Stir gently to coat.
11. Bake in a 300°F oven for 15 minutes; stir.
12. Bake for an additional 5 minutes more.
13. Transfer popcorn mixture to large pieces of foil; cool completely.
14. Break into clusters.
15. Store tightly covered.
Makes about 9 cups. For an extra bonus, you may want to add your favorite kind of peanuts.
